violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -No sneeze guard on the salad bar.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of. -Vacuum sealed meat in the freezer. Talked to facility about HACCP plan.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over the griddle.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates on the salad bar and in the kitchen are not inverted.
